description_long: This is an adult male figure with a bald head and visible facial scarring, dressed in a fitted, utilitarian outfit that appears to be a single-piece jumpsuit. The jumpsuit has reinforced sections at the knees, elbows, and shoulders, suggesting durability and possible protective use. The figure's face is partially disfigured, with pronounced scars and a gaunt appearance, giving a somewhat menacing or post-apocalyptic look. The hands are extended outward, and the fingers are splayed, with the palms facing downward. The shoes are robust and thick-soled, suitable for walking on urban terrain. The overall appearance is rugged, with a focus on functionality and resilience, making the figure suitable for gritty urban or survival scenarios.
description: A bald, scarred adult male in a rugged, reinforced jumpsuit and sturdy shoes, with a gaunt face and extended arms. The figure has a tough, post-apocalyptic appearance suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bald head, facial scars, and full details of the reinforced jumpsuit and sturdy shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, facial disfigurement, and the thickness of the jumpsuit and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the full back of the jumpsuit, and the symmetrical reinforcement details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, scars, and the robust build of the outfit and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: reinforced utility jumpsuit with protective padding
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
